title: Senior Software Engineer - Quikr International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Quikr International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Quikr International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Patna-based team.

About Quikr International Enterprises:
Quikr International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr International Enterprises!
